game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Bridge Race:** Players control a character in a real-time race against 2-3 AI opponents, navigating a 3D obstacle course by swiping a finger across the screen to move. The primary objective is to collect colored blocks matching the player's assigned color, which are scattered across the ground, and then use these blocks to construct bridges over water gaps or climb ramps to reach higher platforms. Each bridge segment requires a specific number of blocks, typically 3-5, and players can temporarily hinder opponents by running into them to knock a few blocks from their inventory. Progression involves completing over 1000 levels, each featuring unique track layouts with varying obstacles like sliders and trampolines, and earning stars based on race completion time. Collected in-game currency allows players to unlock new character skins, block colors, and unique character animations, with difficulty increasing through more complex maps, faster opponents, and fewer available blocks.
game_info.description: Race against AI opponents in a fast-paced bridge-building competition! Collect colored blocks matching your character's color to build bridges across water gaps and climb to higher platforms. Knock into opponents to steal their blocks. Be the first to cross the finish line to win! Each level increases in difficulty with more complex layouts and faster opponents.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move your character (Up/Down/Left/Right)
ENTER: Start the game
ESC: Pause/Unpause the game
R: Restart and return to start screen

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and block collection test. This validates that the player can move around the map and collect blocks of their assigned color.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move the player character around to collect nearby blocks. Test all four directional movements and verify block collection mechanics work correctly.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player position changes in response to movement commands. Block count increases when player collides with matching colored blocks. Test is successful when blocks are collected without errors.

TEST_2.test_description: Win condition test - optimal strategy to complete the race. This validates the full game flow from start to finish including bridge building and racing mechanics.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Collect blocks efficiently, build bridges across water gaps, navigate to higher platforms, and race to the finish line. Prioritize the shortest path while ensuring enough blocks for all bridges.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Player successfully builds all required bridges, reaches the finish line before AI opponents, and triggers GAME_OVER_WIN state. Test is successful when win condition is achieved consistently.
